locked_watermark.rule: Use one consistent compact stacked square HER SPORTS DAILY logo bug in the top-left unless a player face or scoreboard safe zone requires a small top-right shift.
locked_watermark.safe_zone: 48 px minimum margin on 1080x1350. Never stretch, recolor, rotate, or regenerate differently.

fonts.headline: Anton or bold condensed sans fallback
fonts.body: Inter or clean geometric sans fallback
fonts.score: Anton or bold condensed sans fallback
fonts.note: No font files are included or redistributed.

layout.visual_style: bold women’s sports editorial, dark neon system, oversized score/type hierarchy, clean source-safe context panels
